zh.lifeSummary: 當Andrew de Cusack Lord of Gerrardstown於1248年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 米亞斯格勒亞德斯托時，他的父親Sir Geoffrey de Cusack28歲，母親Bridget Petit23歲。他和Maud Pilate至少有3個兒子。他去世於1295年在愛爾蘭庫迪 米亞斯登善林吉勒享年47歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Andrew de Cusack Lord of Gerrardstown于1248年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 米亞斯格勒亞德斯托时，他的父亲Sir Geoffrey de Cusack28岁，母亲Bridget Petit23岁。他和Maud Pilate至少有3个儿子。他去世于1295年在爱尔兰庫迪 米亞斯登善林吉勒享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Cusack
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Aileen, Brigid, Eamon, Fergus, Seamus.

Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Cussac in Guienne, France, named with the Gallo-Roman personal name Cūcius or Cussius + the locative suffix -acum. The surname died out in England, but is common in Ireland, where it was imported at the time of the Anglo-Norman invasion in the 12th century. It has been Gaelicized as de Cíosóg.

variants.name: Cuzick
meanings: Irish and English (Worcestershire): variant of   Cusack  . This form of the surname is no longer found in Ireland and is rare in Britain.

variants.name: Cusick
meanings: Irish and Scottish: variant of   Cusack  , now found predominantly in Scotland.
Americanized form of Polish Kusik or Czech Kusík, Slovak Kúšik and Kušík.
Americanized form of Croatian Kusić, Croatian and Serbian Kušić (see Kusic ), or Serbian Ćušić (see Cusic ).

nameMeanings.name: Andrew
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the Greek name Andreas, a short form of any of various compound names derived from andr- ‘man, warrior’. In the New Testament this is the name of the first disciple to be called by Jesus. After the Resurrection, St Andrew preached in Asia Minor and Greece. He is traditionally believed to have been crucified at Patras in Achaia. He was one of the most popular saints of the Middle Ages and was adopted as the patron of Scotland, Russia, and Greece. It has long been among the most popular boys' names in the English-speaking world, especially in Scotland. Its popularity in England was further enhanced by its use as a British royal name for Prince Andrew ( b. 1960 ), the Duke of York.

en.lifeSummary: When Andrew de Cusack Lord of Gerrardstown was born in 1248, in Gerrardstown, County Meath, Ireland, his father, Sir Geoffrey de Cusack, was 28 and his mother, Bridget Petit, was 23. He had at least 3 sons with Maud Pilate. He died in 1295, in Killeen, Dunshaughlin, County Meath, Ireland, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Andrew de Cusack Lord of Gerrardstown est né en 1248, à Gerrardstown, County Meath, Irlande, son père, Sir Geoffrey de Cusack, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Bridget Petit, avait 23 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils avec Maud Pilate. Il est décédé en 1295, à Killeen, Dunshaughlin, County Meath, Irlande, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Andrew de Cusack Lord of Gerrardstown 1248 in Gerrardstown, County Meath, Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Geoffrey de Cusack 28 und seine Mutter Bridget Petit 23. Er hatte mit Maud Pilate mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb 1295 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Killeen, Dunshaughlin, County Meath, Irland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Andrew de Cusack Lord of Gerrardstown è nato il nel 1248 nel Gerrardstown, County Meath, Irlanda, il suo padre, Sir Geoffrey de Cusack, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Bridget Petit, aveva 23 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli con Maud Pilate. Morì nel 1295, nel Killeen, Dunshaughlin, County Meath, Irlanda, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Andrew de Cusack Lord of Gerrardstownが1248年にアイルランドコウントイ メアスジャーラルドストウンで生まれた時，父Sir Geoffrey de Cusackは28歳，母Bridget Petitは23歳であった。彼はMaud Pilateとの間に少なくとも3人の息子をもうけた。彼は1295年にアイルランドコウントイ メアスダンシャウリンキリーンで47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Andrew de Cusack Lord of Gerrardstown(이)가 1248년 아일랜드 카운티 미스 그라르드스타운에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Geoffrey de Cusack(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Bridget Petit(은)는 23세였다. 그는 Maud Pilate(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1295년 아일랜드 카운티 미스 던쇼그h린 킬린에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Andrew de Cusack Lord of Gerrardstown nasceu em 1248, em Gerrardstown, County Meath, Irlanda, seu pai, Sir Geoffrey de Cusack, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Bridget Petit, tinha 23 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos com Maud Pilate. Ele faleceu em 1295, em Killeen, Dunshaughlin, County Meath, Irlanda, com 47 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Andrew de Cusack Lord of Gerrardstown родился в 1248 г. в местности джиррардстоун, коунти мит, Ирландия, его отцу по имени Sir Geoffrey de Cusack было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Bridget Petit, 23. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына от Maud Pilate. Он умер в 1295 г. в местности киллин, дуншолинь, коунти мит, Ирландия в возрасте 47 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Andrew de Cusack Lord of Gerrardstown nació en 1248, en Gerrardstown, County Meath, Irlanda, su papá, Sir Geoffrey de Cusack, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Bridget Petit, tenía 23 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos con Maud Pilate. Murió en 1295, en Killeen, Dunshaughlin, County Meath, Irlanda, a la edad de 47 años.
